nta.declaration: clock cl; int temp; const int a = 2016; const int b = 2041; const int c = 2067; const int d = 2093; const int e = 2118; const int f = 2144; const int g = 2169; const int h = 2195; const int i = 2221; const int j = 2246; const int k = 2272; const int l = 2297; const int m = 2323; const int n = 2349; const int o = 2374;
